metadata.description: Research → local Zotero (connector-write at latest arXiv version) → optional kg wiki ingest.

plugins.name: zotero-kg
plugins.description: Get research INTO a local Zotero library — no Web API key, connector-write at the latest arXiv version — and onward into a kg knowledge-graph wiki. Configures and launches an already-installed zotero-mcp server.
